channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: Panniantong /Agent-Reach | Python | N/A
item.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

item.title: JCodesMore /ai-website-cloner-template | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

item.title: IceWhaleTech /CasaOS | Go | N/A
item.description: CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

item.title: garrytan /gstack | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

item.title: NanmiCoder /MediaCrawler | Python | N/A
item.description: 小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫 | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫

item.title: aws /agent-toolkit-for-aws | Python | N/A
item.description: Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS

item.title: calesthio /OpenMontage | Python | N/A
item.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

item.title: xbtlin /ai-berkshire | Python | N/A
item.description: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.

item.title: mauriceboe /TREK | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

item.title: alchaincyf /zhangxuefeng-skill | N/A | N/A
item.description: 张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。

item.title: opendatalab /MinerU | Python | N/A
item.description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.

item.title: ripienaar /free-for-dev | HTML | N/A
item.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

item.title: grafana /grafana | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The open and composable observability and data visualization platform. Visualize metrics, logs, and traces from multiple sources like Prometheus, Loki, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB, Postgres and many more.

item.title: commaai /openpilot | Python | N/A
item.description: openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.

item.title: google-labs-code /design.md | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

item.title: simplex-chat /simplex-chat | Haskell | N/A
item.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!
